form.formComment: In the money last time at Wanganui Straight (17.19) in a Class 2/3, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Has three successes and seven minors from 18 starts from box 2. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Class 2/3 on April 7 over 313m at Wanganui Straight behind Mojito Dreams beaten 7 lengths (17.81). Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.75 lengths third at Wanganui Straight but did record a swift 17.39 over the 313m journey. Going okay but this is a test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down entering bend lost ground.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 5 length eighth (18.04) at Wanganui Straight. Previous form sound including a win three back at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest when third (21.67) over 375m at Manawatu. Worth including.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior she recorded an outstanding 21.36 over 375m finishing second at Manawatu. More than capable and well placed to find her best form.
